title: Two Sum
description: Find two numbers in an array that add up to a specific target.

title: Contains Duplicate
description: Check if any value appears at least twice in an array.

title: Valid Anagram
description: Determine if two strings are anagrams of each other.

title: Group Anagrams
description: Group an array of strings into sub-lists of anagrams.

title: Top K Frequent Elements
description: Find the k most frequent elements in an integer array.

title: Product of Array Except Self
description: Return an array where each element is the product of all other elements.

title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
description: Find the length of the longest consecutive elements sequence in an unsorted array.

title: Valid Palindrome
description: Determine if a string is a palindrome, ignoring cases and non-alphanumeric characters.

title: 3Sum
description: Find all unique triplets in the array that sum up to zero.

title: Container With Most Water
description: Find two lines that together with the x-axis forms a container containing the most water.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Calculate how much water can be trapped after raining on an elevation map.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description: Find the maximum profit you can achieve by buying and selling a stock.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

title: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
description: Find the length of the longest substring containing the same letter after replacement.

title: Minimum Window Substring
description: Find the minimum window in a string which contains all the characters of another string.

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Determine if the input string brackets are closed in the correct order and type.

title: Min Stack
description: Design a stack that supports push, pop, top, and retrieving the minimum element in constant time.

title: Daily Temperatures
description: Calculate the number of days to wait until a warmer temperature.

title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
description: Find the area of the largest rectangle in a histogram.

title: Binary Search
description: Implement a basic binary search algorithm to find a target in a sorted array.

title: Search a 2D Matrix
description: Search for a target value in an m x n integer matrix with sorted properties.

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Search for a target value in a sorted array that has been rotated.

title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
description: Find the median of two sorted arrays in O(log(m+n)) time complexity.

title: Reverse Linked List
description: Reverse a singly linked list.

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
description: Merge two sorted linked lists and return it as a sorted list.

title: Linked List Cycle
description: Determine if a linked list has a cycle in it.

title: Reorder List
description: Reorder a linked list such that L0 → Ln → L1 → Ln-1 → L2 → Ln-2...

title: Remove Nth Node From End of List
description: Remove the nth node from the end of the list and return its head.

title: Merge k Sorted Lists
description: Merge k sorted linked lists and return it as one sorted linked list.

title: Invert Binary Tree
description: Invert a binary tree (flip it horizontally).

title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
description: Find the maximum depth (height) of a binary tree.

title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
description: Return the level order traversal of its nodes' values.

title: Validate Binary Search Tree
description: Determine if a binary tree is a valid binary search tree (BST).

title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
description: Find the maximum path sum in a binary tree from any node to any node.

title: Kth Largest Element in a Stream
description: Design a class to find the kth largest element in a stream.

title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
description: Find the kth largest element in an unsorted array.

title: Find Median from Data Stream
description: Design a data structure that supports adding numbers and finding the median.

title: Subsets
description: Given an integer array, return all possible subsets (power set).

title: Combination Sum
description: Find all unique combinations in candidates where the candidate numbers sum to target.

title: N-Queens
description: Place n queens on an n×n chessboard such that no two queens attack each other.

title: Number of Islands
description: Count the number of 2D grid islands surrounded by water using DFS/BFS.

title: Clone Graph
description: Return a deep copy of a connected undirected graph.

title: Alien Dictionary
description: Derive the alphabetical order of letters in an alien language from a sorted list of words.

title: Climbing Stairs
description: Calculate how many distinct ways you can climb to the top of a staircase.

title: Coin Change
description: Find the fewest number of coins needed to make up a given amount.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Find the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence in an array.

title: Longest Common Subsequence
description: Find the length of the longest common subsequence of two strings.

title: Edit Distance
description: Find the minimum number of operations required to convert one string to another.
